evals.name: New API Endpoint
evals.prompt: The plan is at docs/plans/2026-03-14-alert-configs-plan.md. It adds a POST /api/alert-configs endpoint that creates tenant-scoped alert configurations with category and threshold fields. The service layer handles validation and the route mounts after authenticateStaff. Create the contract.
evals.expected_output: A complete contract document with postconditions, invariants, error cases, consumer map, and blast radius
expectations: Contract file created at docs/contracts/ path
All postconditions have specific test names (not generic placeholders)
Blast radius section is populated with specific function names and line references (not N/A or 'seems isolated')
Consumer map lists specific file:line references for each consumer
Error cases cover at least validation failure AND database failure
NOT in Scope section has 3+ explicit items
Quality gate runs and reports a score with PASS/FAIL per criterion
Invariants include tenant_id scoping (INV-1 and INV-2)
Traceability matrix has a Status column with PENDING entries
No banned vague words (should, probably, appropriate, reasonable, properly) in postcondition text

evals.name: Bug Fix Contract
evals.prompt: Users report wrong stock quantities on the product detail page. The root cause is in getProductDetails() at apps/api/src/services/productService.js:L45 — it uses the wrong column (available_stock instead of current_stock). The blast radius includes getProductList() in the same file. Create a bug fix contract.
evals.expected_output: A bug fix contract with root cause trace, blast radius scan, and write site audit
expectations: Contract file created at docs/contracts/ path
All postconditions have specific test names
Blast radius section is populated with specific function names (not N/A)
Consumer map lists specific file:line references
Error cases cover at least validation failure AND database failure
NOT in Scope section has 3+ explicit items
Quality gate runs and reports a score
Invariants include tenant_id scoping
Traceability matrix has a Status column
Root cause trace follows the chain from visible bug back to the defective code line

evals.name: Complex Multi-Layer Feature
evals.prompt: The plan adds a Shopify order ingress system: webhook receiver (HMAC verified), order normalization service, database persistence, and a React admin panel showing recent orders. 4 API endpoints, 2 new tables, 1 webhook handler, 3 React components. Create the contract.
evals.expected_output: A comprehensive contract covering webhook, service, database, and UI layers with cross-layer postconditions
expectations: Contract file created at docs/contracts/ path
All postconditions have specific test names
Blast radius section is populated with specific function names (not N/A)
Consumer map lists specific file:line references
Error cases cover at least validation failure AND database failure
NOT in Scope section has 3+ explicit items
Quality gate runs and reports a score
Invariants include tenant_id scoping
Traceability matrix has a Status column
Contract has postconditions for multiple layers (API, Service, UI, or Cross-layer)
